<thought>
The goal G is directly ahead and to the right of my current position. However, the cell directly in front of me is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right is also a wall, and the cell diagonally to the right-front is a lava cell (L). Therefore, I need to turn left to move towards the free cell.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<action>
